name: Hope Strongarm I
description:
A charge blade made specifically
for the expedition. A shield is
not just for defense. Unleash
your power!

name: Hope Strongarm II
description:
A charge blade made specifically
for the expedition. A shield is
not just for defense. Unleash
your power!

name: Hope Strongarm III
description:
A charge blade made specifically
for the expedition. A shield is
not just for defense. Unleash
your power!

name: Hope Strongarm IV
description:
A charge blade made specifically
for the expedition. A shield is
not just for defense. Unleash
your power!

name: Hope Strongarm V
description:
A charge blade made specifically
for the expedition. A shield is
not just for defense. Unleash
your power!

name: Bone Strongarm I
description:
A charge blade fashioned from
bone. It eschews any elaborate
mechanisms in favor of a sturdy
construction.

name: Bone Strongarm II
description:
A charge blade fashioned from
bone. It eschews any elaborate
mechanisms in favor of a sturdy
construction.

name: Bone Strongarm III
description:
A charge blade fashioned from
bone. It eschews any elaborate
mechanisms in favor of a sturdy
construction.

name: Bone Strongarm IV
description:
A charge blade fashioned from
bone. It eschews any elaborate
mechanisms in favor of a sturdy
construction.

name: Hard Bone Strongarm
description:
Refitted with stronger materials,
this advanced Bone Strongarm
packs the extra power a hunter
craves.

name: Hyperguard I
description:
A charge blade in wide
circulation. Crude, but it's
difficult to break and just
the right heft for novices.

name: Hyperguard II
description:
A charge blade in wide
circulation. Crude, but it's
difficult to break and just
the right heft for novices.

name: Hyperguard III
description:
A charge blade in wide
circulation. Crude, but it's
difficult to break and just
the right heft for novices.

name: Regas Hyper
description:
Better metals allow this
advanced Hyperguard to dish
out extra hurt without
sacrificing any handling.

name: Chata Strongarm I
description:
A Chatacabra charge blade. The
shielded morphing mechanism
increases durability.

name: Chata Strongarm II
description:
A Chatacabra charge blade. The
shielded morphing mechanism
increases durability.

name: Chata Strongarm III
description:
A Chatacabra charge blade. The
shielded morphing mechanism
increases durability.

name: Chata Strongarm IV
description:
A Chatacabra charge blade. The
shielded morphing mechanism
increases durability.

name: Barina Bouclier I
description:
A Lala Barina charge blade rigged
with its fibers. Its slash attacks
paralyze and subdue prey.

name: Barina Bouclier II
description:
A Lala Barina charge blade rigged
with its fibers. Its slash attacks
paralyze and subdue prey.

name: Barina Bouclier III
description:
A Lala Barina charge blade rigged
with its fibers. Its slash attacks
paralyze and subdue prey.

name: Barina Bouclier IV
description:
A Lala Barina charge blade rigged
with its fibers. Its slash attacks
paralyze and subdue prey.

name: Lala Eumenophor
description:
An upgraded Barina Bouclier.
The network of tough fibers
enables even fiercer blows.

name: Uth Valeroje I
description:
An Uth Duna charge blade.
A lovely shield matched with a
water-clad edge to crush quarry.

name: Uth Valeroje II
description:
An Uth Duna charge blade.
A lovely shield matched with a
water-clad edge to crush quarry.

name: Uth Valeroje III
description:
An Uth Duna charge blade.
A lovely shield matched with a
water-clad edge to crush quarry.

name: Valeroje-of-the-Waves
description:
An upgraded Uth Valeroje
with an alluring gleam.
It slams into foes like
a flood, purging ill intent.

name: Rompo Shielder I
description:
Made from Rompopolo parts,
this axe can release a poison
that causes excruciating pain.

name: Rompo Shielder II
description:
Made from Rompopolo parts,
this axe can release a poison
that causes excruciating pain.

name: Rompo Shielder III
description:
Made from Rompopolo parts,
this axe can release a poison
that causes excruciating pain.

name: Rompo Dendrotox
description:
The Rompo Shielder speaks: My
sword boasts greater doses,
and my shield, more time.
I seek a wielder clever of mind.

name: Rey Astrapi I
description:
A charge blade imbued with
Rey Dau's thunder. Its sharp
wingtalons can pierce any
scale.

name: Rey Astrapi II
description:
A charge blade imbued with
Rey Dau's thunder. Its sharp
wingtalons can pierce any
scale.

name: Rey Astrapi III
description:
A charge blade imbued with
Rey Dau's thunder. Its sharp
wingtalons can pierce any
scale.

name: Astrapi Clairaxe
description:
An upgraded Rey Astrapi.
May its thunder echo free,
shaking heaven and earth
and prostrating all foes.

name: Arachnoscale I
description:
A Nerscylla charge blade that
uses its uniquely shaped parts
to release frictional heat
from slashes.

name: Arachnoscale II
description:
A Nerscylla charge blade that
uses its uniquely shaped parts
to release frictional heat
from slashes.

name: Arachnoscale III
description:
A Nerscylla charge blade that
uses its uniquely shaped parts
to release frictional heat
from slashes.

name: Arachnoscythe
description:
An upgraded Arachnoscale. The
improved heat releaser can cut
through thick plating like butter.

name: Windthrash Charger I
description:
An axe made using Hirabami
materials. No prey can
escape its claws.

name: Windthrash Charger II
description:
An axe made using Hirabami
materials. No prey can
escape its claws.

name: Windthrash Charger III
description:
An axe made using Hirabami
materials. No prey can
escape its claws.

name: Windthrash Tamebami
description:
An upgraded Windthrash Charger.
Capable of striking down any
foe caught in the fierce gusts
of its dance-like synergy.

name: Nu Pweza I
description:
A Nu Udra charge blade. It traps
the living world in a maelstrom
of damnation.

name: Nu Pweza II
description:
A Nu Udra charge blade. It traps
the living world in a maelstrom
of damnation.

name: Abaddonian Pweza
description:
An upgraded Nu Pweza. From
the nethermost reaches, it is
poised to immolate all hope
in infernal fire.

name: Albirath Blade I
description:
A Guardian Rathalos charge
blade. Like a blazing fire, its
wielder's spirit never abates.

name: Albirath Blade II
description:
A Guardian Rathalos charge
blade. Like a blazing fire, its
wielder's spirit never abates.

name: Guardian Albathos
description:
An upgraded Albirath Blade.
A regal soul rests within its
immaculate flood of power.

name: Chthonian Flame I
description:
A Guardian Ebony Odogaron
charge blade. Beholden to
beastly cravings, its thirst
for blood never wanes.

name: Chthonian Flame II
description:
A Guardian Ebony Odogaron
charge blade. Beholden to
beastly cravings, its thirst
for blood never wanes.

name: Bequeathed Enmity
description:
An upgraded Chthonian Flame.
Despite chewing free of its
cycle of hunger, the beast
remains unsated.

name: G. Veldian Labrys I
description:
A charge blade made from
Guardian spoils. When wielded
by those with weak spirit, its
power corrupts, inviting ruin.

name: G. Veldian Labrys II
description:
A charge blade made from
Guardian spoils. When wielded
by those with weak spirit, its
power corrupts, inviting ruin.

name: G. Abiding Gawain
description:
An upgraded G. Veldian Labrys.
The earth still bears the marks
of its mighty clash with a wyvern.

name: Poison Blade I
description:
A horrific charge blade rigged
with Gypceros poison. Its
venomous edge cuts through
prey like butter.

name: Poison Blade II
description:
A horrific charge blade rigged
with Gypceros poison. Its
venomous edge cuts through
prey like butter.

name: Venom's Kiss
description:
An upgraded Poison Blade that
drips with deadly toxin and
plunges prey into a slow,
tormenting nightmare.

name: Dear Lutemis I
description:
A Rathian charge blade as
ominous as it is elegant. Her
regal air lives on in the thorns
lining the handle.

name: Dear Lutemis II
description:
A Rathian charge blade as
ominous as it is elegant. Her
regal air lives on in the thorns
lining the handle.

name: Dear Lutemia
description:
An upgraded Dear Lutemis.
Its beauty is somehow sublime
and severe at the same time.

name: Aslat Charger I
description:
An elegant Seregios charge blade.
Its shining, golden blade serves
as a beacon of hope for those
who aspire to revolution.

name: Rebellious Charger
description:
The spirit of revolution lies
within its golden blade. Wield
the upgraded Aslat Charger
and rend the world asunder.

name: Axelion Blade I
description:
This charge blade made
from Rathalos spoils adds
a combustion mechanism
to attacks.

name: Bardichion Blade
description:
An upgraded Axelion Blade.
That snarling wyvern on the
shield looks eager to
incinerate prey.

name: Elendskraft I
description:
A Gore Magala charge blade
adorned with a skull bursting
with power. It hungers to
cast foes into darkness.

name: Leidenskraft
description:
An upgraded Elendskraft.
It invites its victims to journey
to dark and hellish depths.

name: Veldian Labrys I
description:
An Arkveld charge blade. Used by
a knight to expel wyverns and
light the way to tomorrow.

name: Artian Defender I
description:
A weapon made from unearthed
fragments. The complex gears
are said to tick toward an
unknown end.

name: Artian Defender II
description:
A weapon made from unearthed
fragments. The complex gears
are said to tick toward an
unknown end.

name: Chrono Gear
description:
An ancient weapon with latent
potential. Now repaired, its
clock hands cannot be stopped.

name: Esperanza Strongarm
description:
A fully field-tested Hope
Strongarm. With each charge,
despair becomes a distant
memory.

name: Shrouded Kutharja
description:
A stronger version of the Chata
Strongarm. Capable of both
deflecting attacks and crushing
foes with its shroud of energy.

name: Abiding Gawain
description:
An upgraded Veldian Labrys.
Beloved by the sun, its
knightly wielder scorched
a path to victory.

name: Zoh Yirmiya I
description:
A Zoh Shia charge blade with
a snow-white crown. Bestows
redemption and purification
with every swing.

name: Blazing Yirmiya
description:
Yirmiya harketh from on high:
Thou who seekest recompense,
may thy wings spread even
in the face of ruination.

name: Mizuniya Drill I
description:
An elegant charge blade
known for staining foes'
clothing a deep blood red.

name: Final Fieldblade
description:
An upgraded Mizuniya Drill.
It creates a sea of crimson
that washes away all foes.

name: Lagia Storm I
description:
A charge blade made of Lagiacrus
materials. Signals the start of
a hunt with the roar of thunder.

name: Vankrom Blade
description:
An upgraded Lagia Storm imbued
with the power of Lagiacrus, lord
of the seas. Its vicious tempest
carves a swathe through the sea.

name: Promised Abyss
description:
A grotesque weapon that thirsts
for potential, its forbidden coffin
thrown wide by unpunished sin.

name: Promised Abyss
description:
A grotesque weapon that thirsts
for potential, its forbidden coffin
thrown wide by unpunished sin.

name: Promised Abyss
description:
A grotesque weapon that thirsts
for potential, its forbidden coffin
thrown wide by unpunished sin.
